description: Letter from Avraham b. Hillel to Moshe ha-Kohen ha-Talmid. Dating: ca. late 12th or early 13th century. Beginning with a biblical quotation (Shemuel I 25:6). Conveying congratulations on the occasion of the opening of a perfume shop and reporting receipt of the addressee's letter. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
